selected_markets.title: Will the high temp in Chicago be <46° on Feb 14, 2026?
Will the **high temp in Austin** be 74-75° on Feb 14, 2026?

valuations.rationale: Mid-prob of 0.76 adjusted downward by enrich_bias (0.0408). Chicago in mid-February typically sees highs around 30-35°F; <46° is quite likely but not certain. Moderate volume supports liquidity. Confidence limited by weather unpredictability and small sample size.

Mid-prob of 0.015 adjusted slightly upward by enrich_bias. Austin in mid-February typically sees highs 60-70°F; a narrow band of 74-75° is quite specific and unlikely. Very low probability is justified by climatology. Higher confidence due to clear seasonal baseline and tight temperature range.
